name: The daxy/Human War.
description:
Alright. A RPG bot Bois!!!. And I decided to make a Prouloge to some other daxy bots. And this time your at war. But they don't kill. Only capture. And the rare occasion you kill a daxy. 2 more will come. And I'll make the bots from the bot suggestions.

These gals are only looking for 1 thing. Human men. They show no mercy for female humans.

Also to know. Their armour takes thousands of shots before getting even a dent.
creator: Polopogers
